placements.overview:
Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research is a private institute, established in 1919 in Kadi, Gujarat. Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 5 courses at UG levels in 4 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology and Mechanical Engineering. Furthermore, it offer course such as B.E. / B.Tech in Full Time mode. Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research fee structure includes a total tuition fee is INR 3,30,600. Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research has an annual seat intake of 240 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Engineering. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research offers diverse programmes at UG level in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research fee structure for all the courses is around INR 3,30,600.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Campus life of computer engineering in vidush somany college .

review_content.Placements: It was a very bad college placement. Only 5% of students got placed in my college. At the time of admission, they told me that top companies would arrive, but in placement, small companies arrived and also took a few students. Every time they take penalties for exam forms, college feels and all things.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice; all the classes are fully fanned. Air conditioning is not available. The hostel is located beside the college. A canteen is also available near campus. There are very few food stalls outside the college. All the floors have lifts and windows.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vidush Somany Institute Of Technology and Research.

review_content.Placements: Around 10-20% of students get placed every year in our course. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc., visit our college. Around 20-30% of students got internships in top companies in India. Top roles offered are software designer, CEO, manager, product manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is slow. Labs are huge. Each lab has only a few computers. Classrooms are good. The library is good. It has only a few books. There is no digital library in our college. The hostel is very old. It is not good in condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Informative and interesting.

review_content.Placements: 80 Percent of students placed in my course and some students get the internship from companies. I don't know how many numbers of students are actually get the internship But some students participating in the hekathons. Two or more students get job in companies and its package around three to five lacks per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by college is free wi-fi, high performance computer labs and the infrastructure of classroom if very interactive, mess and canteen Provided healthy and frase food. College organize the sports events every year and also organize the technical hands on workshop on the current demanding technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placement and internship opportunities in different companies. Almost 50% of students got placed in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities like a sports ground, Wi-Fi, a canteen, well-established labs, etc.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They always guide us during exams. They conduct viva for 30 marks. The passing marks are 23 out of 70 marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Many companies come to select students who are good at their knowledge. It's very helpful for all students. At least 50 students in our batch get jobs in different places. They also get a good salary package of about 3 LPA to 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities. The library has a variety of books. There is a playground to play various games. They provide a good Wi-Fi connection.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers play a very crucial role in our college days. They help in many situations, like guiding properly during project submissions and giving important notes during exams. We should get 23 out of 70 and 30 in viva.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure & educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am in the last year, and many companies are visiting their interview on our campus. Not only do they start a discussion, but many companies select a student with a 4 to 5 LPA. The highest package is 10LPA, and the lowest is 3LPA, but mainly they give 4 to 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a bright classroom with a built-in projector and a speaker. There is a separate lab for every subject, and each lab has new technology equipment. There is a hostel on campus, so it helps to reach college on time, and the hostel room is also good.

placements.overview:
Founded in 2008, Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur is a private institute. It is located in BilasPur, Chhattisgarh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 7 courses across specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Electronics Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur fees ranges between INR 1,22,000 to 2,80,420. The student intake for these courses is 450. Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur offers all the campus facilities to students.

Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur courses stands around INR 1,22,000 to 2,80,420.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus, helpful teacher faculty, management is good, canteen & cafeteria both are good.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are 67 students. Out of these 67 students, only some of the students were selected during the placement drive. I also got selected in one of the placement drives, but I rejected the offer because of some personal issues. However, in this college, there is more chance to get selected if you are a hardworking person. You can easily get selected in the placement process.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are fully separate facilities for girls and boys. The boys' hostel is just opposite the girls' hostel to maintain discipline between boys and girls. They provide Wi-Fi, water, theatre, electricity, and all the necessary things to make life easier. The wardens are helpful for the students who live in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Only good if you are not getting any government college or you want to study in Bilaspur.

review_content.Placements: Almost sixty percentage of interested students got placement, who really prepared for the placement's group discussions, tests, interviews and all. The highest package goes to 5.5 LPA. Most of the companies are from non-tech background. Best for M. B.A. Graduates.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, labs, classrooms, and all departments are well placed. Hostel facility is also good, they provide free wi-fi for the students but canteen's food is really bad. Girls hostel is said to be better than boys hostel. But I've visited boys hostel and it is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good education, better teachers and the best campus.

review_content.Placements: Students with relevant skills and interests are placed. 70% of the civil engineering department students have got placed through college placements. 18 l. p. a. is the highest package offered in this course. Freshers as well as the higher position are also available for placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is fully Wi-Fi campus. Digital classrooms and has 2 libraries. Every practical subjects have their own lab. Food is average in the mess. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports and game take place and organized with great joy. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. 2 bedded, 3 bedded as well as 4 bedded rooms are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered here was up to 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course were Jaro Education, Technolitics, Justdial, Byju's, Cognixia, Collebra and many more. About 20% of the students got internships in Jaro Education.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is provided along with air-conditioning facilities. The food served is average, but the sports facilities are very good. Medical facilities are also available, and in the canteens, cleanliness is maintained. The library is highly furnished and equipped with books and a friendly environment. In our course, major project training, internship, science lab and MAT lab are provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good for theoretical knowledge but not for practical aspects of it.

review_content.Placements: 4 LPA was the maximum package offered at my time. ROI is not there. Only CSE students can get placement here because the companies which visit campus are more of the IT sector. Rest all stream students doesn't get placements. No fixed companies are there which visit for placement on regular intervals so can't tell about top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Hostel and College both are quiet good. The campus is well maintained, kept clean and hygienic. Classrooms have CCTV cameras. All the labs have required equipments. The only problem is with the food and quality of food served in the hostel it's pathetic. But there is a Cafeteria in the campus which provides hgoodood food and is well maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Bilaspur for study.

review_content.Placements: Students should score a minimum of 65% in their academics to take admission in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are Just Dial and power plants like Jindal. Electrical is a core subject in engineering, and students should score above 65% of marks in their academics to get an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were good in our college. Every lab has all equipment with proper maintenance. The campus is awesome with a huge garden, basketball court, playground and cafeteria.

review_summary.college_name: Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus, helpful teacher faculty, management is good, canteen & cafeteria both are good.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are 67 students. Out of these 67 students, only some of the students were selected during the placement drive. I also got selected in one of the placement drives, but I rejected the offer because of some personal issues. However, in this college, there is more chance to get selected if you are a hardworking person. You can easily get selected in the placement process.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are fully separate facilities for girls and boys. The boys' hostel is just opposite the girls' hostel to maintain discipline between boys and girls. They provide Wi-Fi, water, theatre, electricity, and all the necessary things to make life easier. The wardens are helpful for the students who live in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Only good if you are not getting any government college or you want to study in Bilaspur.

content.Placements: Almost sixty percentage of interested students got placement, who really prepared for the placement's group discussions, tests, interviews and all. The highest package goes to 5.5 LPA. Most of the companies are from non-tech background. Best for M. B.A. Graduates.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, labs, classrooms, and all departments are well placed. Hostel facility is also good, they provide free wi-fi for the students but canteen's food is really bad. Girls hostel is said to be better than boys hostel. But I've visited boys hostel and it is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good education, better teachers and the best campus.

content.Placements: Students with relevant skills and interests are placed. 70% of the civil engineering department students have got placed through college placements. 18 l. p. a. is the highest package offered in this course. Freshers as well as the higher position are also available for placement.
content.Infrastructure: College is fully Wi-Fi campus. Digital classrooms and has 2 libraries. Every practical subjects have their own lab. Food is average in the mess. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports and game take place and organized with great joy. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. 2 bedded, 3 bedded as well as 4 bedded rooms are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered here was up to 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course were Jaro Education, Technolitics, Justdial, Byju's, Cognixia, Collebra and many more. About 20% of the students got internships in Jaro Education.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is provided along with air-conditioning facilities. The food served is average, but the sports facilities are very good. Medical facilities are also available, and in the canteens, cleanliness is maintained. The library is highly furnished and equipped with books and a friendly environment. In our course, major project training, internship, science lab and MAT lab are provided.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfying faculty, but good placements in 2019 and 2020.

review_content.Placements: 30-50% of students get placements in the private software companies. The highest package in our college is 7lack per annum and the lowest package is 2lack per annum. Top recruiting companies are TCS, INFOSYS, WIPRO and HCL.70-90% got internship from our branch. No one got any top role from our college all placements as workers in industries and employees in software companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available only for the computer labs laptap is allowed into college but mobile is not allowed into college. In my department labs are not good they are working properly because, at the time of corona there is no proper maintenance for the machines so they are not working. Classrooms are not bad. The library not good and noot bad also. Food in the hostel mess is not bad. In the there is no availability of varieties of foods. There is no medical facility in the college. faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Tadipatri Engineering College for students?

faqs.answer: Tadipatri Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Tadipatri Engineering College are After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Tadipatri Engineering College has a rating of 3.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.1, 3.4, 4.3 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Tadipatri Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and placements in 2024-25.

content.Placements: 94% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 6.4 LPA in 2025, and the lowest in 2025 is 3.9 LPA. Many companies were recruiting from our course and college. Many students got internships in our course in many companies. Many roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: We have a better climate, excellent classrooms, and a well-stocked library with good books, though Wi-Fi is not available. Hostel facilities are good, and the food is generally good, but there was one instance where the curries were not up to par. Additionally, half a day each week is dedicated to sports and yoga, led by college experts..

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The rankers starts from 1 Lacs can get the seats in this college. The average package we get in our college is 3 to 4 Lacs per annum. The most famous companies also come to recruit the students from the college. The infrastructure is good. The programme testers are selected from our college last year.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college are very good. The Wi-Fi is also available in our college campus. The labs are also filled with better equipments which students make use of them in a very good and proper way. The classrooms are very large to make students free. The library is also available with subject books. The hostel is with average facilities with better food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfying faculty, but good placements in 2019 and 2020.

content.Placements: 30-50% of students get placements in the private software companies. The highest package in our college is 7lack per annum and the lowest package is 2lack per annum. Top recruiting companies are TCS, INFOSYS, WIPRO and HCL.70-90% got internship from our branch. No one got any top role from our college all placements as workers in industries and employees in software companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available only for the computer labs laptap is allowed into college but mobile is not allowed into college. In my department labs are not good they are working properly because, at the time of corona there is no proper maintenance for the machines so they are not working. Classrooms are not bad. The library not good and noot bad also. Food in the hostel mess is not bad. In the there is no availability of varieties of foods. There is no medical facility in the college. They raise the fund for sports and games. Play ground is somehow good .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Tadipatri Engineering College.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed in our course. The highest package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Kia, Cognizant Solutions Crop, Ram-G Industries and other companies come here. Very few students got internships. Field test engineer, customer support engineer and many other roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not good, and the infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms have benches and fans. Labs are accessible. The quality of hostel facilities is not bad, but the quality and quantity of food are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of faculty in 2020.

content.Placements: Nearly 25% students joined in CSE. The package for year is nearly 35-50k Top recruiting companies are HCL techm mahindra only 20% of students got internship from our course in HCL and tech Mahindra companies this course has many benifits you have maximum opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average looks like old especially in classrooms. But management is trying to improve infrastructure. Labs are available. They have two computers Labs. Wi-Fi facility available. Classrooms cleanness need to improve. I like the library because it has lots of books.

review_summary.college_name: Shyam University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a unique college. There are many students, and there are many games.

content.Placements: There were good students who achieved 90 percent in their course. The highest package was Rs. 90,000 and the lowest package was Rs. 30,000. The top recruiting companies percentage of students who got internships from their course. The top role had a package of Rs. 90,000. It was a unique college and a smile. You could take admission.
content.Infrastructure: It was a shining college with Wi Fi and high speed data. There were big labs and they were clean. There were many classrooms and they were very big. There was a library and it was a nice place with no shouting. It was silent and quiet. Many games were played and there were medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college for students .

content.Placements: Good number of students were placed in my course. On an average 4lac per annum package offered in my course. Top recruiting companies in my course were from all part of India. Around 40 to 50 percent of candidates got internship from my course during college time.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided by college management was good and manageable. In college campus free Wi-Fi faciliye available and good developed labs for practical classes available in college. The quality of facilities provided in hostel was also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a unique college. There are many students, and there are many games.
reviews.review_text: It was a shining college with Wi Fi and high speed data. There were big labs and they were clean. There were many classrooms and they were very big. review_summary.college_name: University Institute of Technology, Alappuzha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Co-operation - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The toilets are not good and have a small area. Absolutely dissatisfied because of sports and fests.

content.Placements: There is more scope for B.Com graduates in accounting companies. Compared to other UG courses, B.Com operations is more helpful for getting jobs in the commerce industry.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in the college are not bad. There is Wi-Fi available. The computer lab is good, clean, and air-conditioned. It is maintained well. The classrooms are great for studying and are clean. There is no hostel inside the college, but outside, there is a canteen-like shop that is good.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is great. Teachers are good and well-qualified. Some of them are rude to students, but most are friendly to students. Semesters are not difficult here, similar to other colleges, with well-managed exams and no chance for copying. Many students pass all semesters with great percentages. The semester fee is Rs.11,000, and the exam fee is Rs.505 now.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Co-operation - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. The placement percentage of our college is 100%. The rest depends upon your hard work and dedication. MNCs visit our college to recruit students. Top recruiting companies are Infopark, Technopark, Aditya Bank, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has labs, classrooms, a library, labs, etc. They provide medical facilities. They encourage students for sports and games. Libraries are good. They provide sports and games facilities. Our college has good environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty, and placements in 2021.

content.Placements: No supply students were placed. There is no highest lowest or average package. Top companies are spreading, Infosys, TCS are top recruiting companies in our college. Above 85 % of marked students got internships from the course and got placed in Meridian. The top role offered is Ceridian.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are Free Wi-Fi, good teachers and a good classroom, a good hygiene lab with centralized AC, big playground. The classroom and surroundings are cleaned every day. Our college has a football and cricket team.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2021 even under covid-19 issues.

content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed in our course. The highest package was 24000. The lowest package was 23000 and the best package offered was 27000. The top recruiting companies for our course were Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 60% of students got internships from our course. The top roles offered in our course are Software Programmer, Sound software Designer, and Software Developer.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries available to be mentioned in our list of facilities and infrastructure. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is average, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are also better.

reviews.review_heading: The toilets are not good and have a small area. Absolutely dissatisfied because of sports and fests.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the college are not bad. There is Wi-Fi available. The computer lab is good, clean, and air-conditioned. It is maintained well. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has labs, classrooms, a library, labs, etc. They provide medical facilities. They encourage students for sports and games. Libraries are good. They provide sports and games facilities. Our college has good environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty, and placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are Free Wi-Fi, good teachers and a good classroom, a good hygiene lab with centralized AC, big playground. The classroom and surroundings are cleaned every day. Our college has a football and cricket team.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2021 even under covid-19 issues.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries available to be mentioned in our list of facilities and infrastructure. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is average, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are also better.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college faculty, but there are no extracurricular activities for students.

review_content.Placements: The college placements are below average, and the placement programs only provide students with low and average packages, even if they have extra skills. This is because only a handful of companies participate in the college placement drive. The average salary package for students from the college ranges between 2 LPA and 5-6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has sufficient facilities and modern infrastructure. It contains a large ground, a volleyball court, a basketball court, a garden, a library, Wi-Fi, three computer labs, spacious ventilated classrooms (without air conditioning), two canteens, and sufficient sports equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall review about our college is average.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed from our college is more than 80%. Top companies visiting our campus for placement are Infosys, HCL, Cogent Services, and many more. Top package for our college students is 18 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are of many types. Firstly, in my college, there is a huge campus and playground where students can play and live. Our hostel quality is average. Food is not so hygienic and the taste is also not good but we can accept the meal they serve.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: According to me, my college provides many placement opportunities to students and also teaches and helps students to get placed in companies. Many companies visit our college, like TCS, Infosys, and many mass recruiters. The average package of my college is 4.5 to 7 LPA, and the highest package is approximately 50 LPA. This college also provides many opportunities for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a decently leveled infrastructure and facilities for ourselves, such as web development labs, mechanical labs, electrical labs, a huge library, clean classrooms, etc. The hostel provides an average level of food quality. Please don't compare it with homemade food, but comparatively, it's really okay.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Shri Ram College, Muzaffarnagar: College review

content.Placements: I am a student of Shri Ram College Muzaffarnagar and I am very happy to write this review. Our college is among the top 20 colleges of Maa Shakumbhari University. Every year, 80 to 90% of students get placed easily here, and good companies like Google, Microsoft, etc., keep coming here for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Our college looks very beautiful, with boundaries all around. Every department has its own library where you can study, and you're also provided with a separate Wi-Fi facility. For courses like BCA or Computer Science, there are also computer labs you can use in your free time. Additionally, we have 2 different canteens here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The worst college experience - Fake placement, poor teaching, and no support.

content.Placements: The placement of this college is the worst. The website shows in the Shri Ram Group of Colleges official website is 100% fake about placement. No MNCs like at least Tata visit the campus. Only sales jobs are offered with very low packages. Very few students (1-2%) get placed. There is no real placement support.
content.Infrastructure: Only the building looks good. Labs are not working properly, and classrooms are average. Hostel rooms are not good. Washrooms are dirty and mess food is the worst. No proper medical, sports, and no proper management. When we are talking about the infrastructure then this is good.

Food quality is decent and canteens, medical facilities, sports and games are fine for the price range. There are not many sports and gaming facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram College, Muzaffarnagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, but the infrastructure of our college is far better than other colleges. The food served in the hostel is good compared to other hostels. They don't provide a separate room for students. Around 4 students can stay in a single room. The boys' hostel is available on campus. The girls' hostel is available around 500 meters away from campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with campus life.
reviews.review_text: You will get everything on campus. It had a library, photocopy machines, a water cooler, hygienic washrooms, etc. The infrastructure was beautiful. I was a day scholar. The canteen food was average. Sports and games are conducted in February or March every year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty, good infrastructure, good facilities, and a huge playground.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, clean classrooms, a library, a hostel, a canteen, and medical facilities are available. The canteen and hostel are cleaned daily. The food in the canteen and its interior are good. The hostel feels like a home, with high security.

reviews.review_heading: We are fully satisfied in every aspect like faculty, facilities, infrastructure, placement, etc.
reviews.review_text: I found the best facilities and infrastructure in our college like Wi-Fi working all the time. There are digital classrooms and well-set labs. The facility provided in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food is excellent and we feel very secure inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and convenient as per the surrounding society.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite amazing. It has all facilities like neat and clean toilets and washrooms. Clean and hygienic food is available in canteens. Food is available at reasonable prices for the students and staff members. Classrooms are wide with a digital projector.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram College,Muzaffarnagar.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are better, clean and healthy. A huge library is available with proper facilities. The library has a huge collection of books and daily newspapers. There is a huge canteen which serves better quality food at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: College and faculty were good, but placements were below average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure were very good. Canteens were also excellent. Sports and games were also excellent, and new tournaments were organized every month. The quality of food in the canteen was excellent. Labs and classrooms were well maintained and clean. The library was also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the college. We have sports competitions, farewells, and freshers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is super great, with many hostels available. All kinds of sports are offered here. We have auditoriums, and activities like debates, moot courts, and other events are regularly conducted. Our sports competitions are highly competitive, with participants coming from various places and other colleges as well.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Rewiew : The good and the best.
reviews.review_text: The college has wide campus with many facilities like library, cafeteria, sports ground, labs, SMART class, hostel. The college has Wi-Fi campus. College provided many other facilities such as security, medical and canteen for students. Thank you.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college before COVID .

review_content.Placements: During admission, we were told that 100% placement is there but later when we passed out from college we got to know that the college offers no placement. Doing an internship at the college didn't provide any support we students found everything and with the approval of the department we visited.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities and infrastructure were good. But many of them are not working properly and the way of teaching in the lab is such that they just wanted us to pass the subject.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers were helping and they taught us very well that is the only reason why we passed the exam. But many of them didn't even know how to teach. The pass percentage of the college is really very low when compared to colleges nearby it. Teachers are qualified but not all are knowledgeable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for study but not for placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very poor here. I have completed my B.Tech in ME from here. Some placement drives were organised during my tenure, but none of them is good company. So, for placements, I do not recommend this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good here. Lab facilities are also good here. Most importantly, our college is situated far from the city, so you will get a good study environment. They are still developing the infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not provided during my tenure, but I don't know the current scenario. However, there is a huge library, labs and canteen.

individual_reviews.title: This college is best for the Engineering aspirants as it is cheap and reliable with best facilities.

content.Placements: This college has remarkable record of placement. Many Students of this college is working in various company on Best packages. In Last Placement the highest package was 10 Lacs given by byjus. Every year different companies pays visit to this college like Byjus, TCS, Google, Amazon etc. As this college has marvellous placement record.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides the best facilities in Mechanical Course. They provide good classroom with peaceful and silent Hospital. This college also provides the basic amenities of a student like free Wi-Fi, Good Labs with all instruments for Mechanical students. Hostel is also best because they keep the hostel hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is not worth the money.

content.Placements: From 2-3 years, there had been no major companies providing placements excluding the local companies which offer the salary of Rs. 4,000-5,000 per month, neither internships were provided by the college. The college doesn't have a good management to bring in good companies for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college looks pretty good, but all your expectations go in veins when you visit it. The land is not used well and is left idle. The campus doesn't have a playground for students. There is no proper canteen too. The college doesn't believe in providing good facilities to students.

answer.text: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_content.General: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided in college. The canteen is available, and also bus facilities drop and pick students from different locations of the city. A sufficient number of computers with labs are in the college. Separate classrooms are available for different branches, and also labs are available. The college ground is for playing sports, and a library is for study. Although I was not in the college hostel, according to my knowledge, it was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College is good, and infrastructure is very well-developed, but placements are not good.

review_content.Placements: College is good, but only two students from my batch were placed in TCS last year. Salary package offered was 3 LPA. Some of my friends are pursuing their internships off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Course is good, and infrastructure of college is also excellent. College has a library and a ground. Classrooms and labs are also good. I'm not staying in hostel because I have my own house in the city. However, college canteen is very good, and college campus is also well-maintained.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching quality is good, and teachers are very supportive and knowledgeable. All of them are highly qualified. Course curriculum is relevant and prepares students to be industry-ready. Pass percentage is 40%, and exams are not too difficult.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2022, and really good facilities.

review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is outside of the city; it is a very peaceful place, helpful for concentration on our study. The food in the mess is very tasty in the hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Mahakal Institute of Technology and Management (MITM, Ujjain) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Yes, the college is good, but if you have a lot of money, you can choose different colleges.

content.Placements: The placement percentage of the college in the college list is 80%, but I know about the condition of the IT industry, so the placement percentage of my college is 60 to 70%. Yes, all the companies belong to the IT background, so all the students are preparing for the placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the college also provides library facilities and mess facilities in the hostel. The food is good. The college also provides a sports kit where all the sports materials are provided, and there is a cricket ground in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure in college, bus facilities with multiple stops in the city, events, sports, & NC

content.Placements: According to my knowledge, around 70% of them were placed in or out of the campus after passing out. I think the highest package was of 12 LPA and the lowest package was of 4 LPA. Some local companies also visited the college with below packages. Top recruiter companies are Yash Technology, Consulted, Impetus, and other companies. According to my knowledge, 40-50% of them did internships in their hometown and outside in different fields. In placements, many roles were offered, including System Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided in college. The canteen is available, and also bus facilities drop and pick students from different locations of the city. A sufficient number of computers with labs are in the college. Separate classrooms are available for different branches, and also labs are available. The college ground is for playing sports, and a library is for study. Although I was not in the college hostel, according to my knowledge, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is good, and infrastructure is very well-developed, but placements are not good.

content.Placements: College is good, but only two students from my batch were placed in TCS last year. Salary package offered was 3 LPA. Some of my friends are pursuing their internships off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: Course is good, and infrastructure of college is also excellent. College has a library and a ground. Classrooms and labs are also good. I'm not staying in hostel because I have my own house in the city. However, college canteen is very good, and college campus is also well-maintained.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality is good, and teachers are very supportive and knowledgeable. All of them are highly qualified. Course curriculum is relevant and prepares students to be industry-ready. Pass percentage is 40%, and exams are not too difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2022, and really good facilities.

content.Placements: My batch admission in 2022. 70% students got placed last year in campus drive in our college. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Infotech, Yash Technologies, etc. are the top recruiting companies for our course. There is a 7 lakh average package, and 27 lakh is the highest package in college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is outside of the city; it is a very peaceful place, helpful for concentration on our study. There is Wi-Fi facility available, labs and classrooms, and there are more than 70000 books available in our college library. The hostel is very good in our college. The food in the mess is very tasty in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: For those living near Ujjain, this is the best option for pursuing your desired course.

content.Placements: The highest package is 21 Lacs, but an MIT alumnus secured a package of 2 crores at Amazon. The college organizes internship programs, some of which are paid and some are unpaid. Many high-level companies visit the campus, including Amazon, Flipkart, Harman, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HSBC, and others.
content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi available for students, but the facilities, aside from Wi-Fi, are excellent. The library is accessible for students to read or issue books, and the bathrooms are top-notch in cleanliness. Overall, the campus is above average and is the best option for those living in or near Ujjain.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Library and classrooms are well-furnished. There are 4 to 5 computer labs. Wi-Fi is provided on campus. They provide 34 MB per day. Hostel facility is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent infrastructure, but faculty members are a source of concern.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good infrastructure. The management was not good. We were paying for infrastructure and comfort because the management team was unprepared to hear your concerns. They only get you into trouble by sending you from one place to another.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here have good knowledge in their respective fields.
reviews.review_text: Students become eligible for campus placements after the 3rd year. Many companies like TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc., visit here. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. Above 90% of students get placed from the CSE branch. The TPO group of MIT is very interactive, well educated and well-reputed. They provide technical as well as non-technical recruitment as it depends on students what they want and where they want to make their future. However, the best part is if you get placed...

reviews.review_heading: Students can learn lots of things and also get good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college has many labs and workshops for students to gain practical knowledge. Labs have good facilities to conduct experiments. The only problem is that the students can visit the labs only once in a week, and the rule is the same for the library as well. The library is good, but they provide technical books for a specific period, and other books and novels that are useful for self-development of students are also available. If you are a sports person, then this is the right place for you to...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure. Most of the classrooms are now smart classrooms. Every lab was well-equipped and had most of the resources required for a student and teacher need to work. Our college has an enriched library with books by various authors of the same domain. The best part of the college was a canteen. It served the most delicious dishes and was also hygienic. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure. MIT group has the best and largest infrastruc...

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you to think twice before taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It is attractive. The fee amount collected from students is invested in infrastructure. It doesn't have good computer labs. Most of the projectors are not working well. The library doesn't have new edition books, and all books are of 15-years old editions. Please make sure the book you get from the library is not damaged, or else,  they will take money from you when you submit it, even it is not your mistake.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Mahakal Institute of Technology, Ujjain.
reviews.review_text: According to me, MITM, Ujjain has the best infrastructure. At MIT, there are 6 buildings which provide different courses for students. The infrastructure is completely open, and a lot of space is provided in all the sections of the building. Fresh air is available which is good for health as well.

reviews.review_heading: My review is based on the environment, and the events celebrated in the college.
reviews.review_text: We have a good infrastructure on the campus. We have a cricket ground. The condition of the labs and classrooms is poor. The classes are not the smart classrooms, but they will charge the fee for the smart classrooms. We have a canteen with all the required facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but facilities are not good. There are no proper laboratories and practical labs. No proper tools are provided, and no proper instructions are provided. Majority time practical classes are not taken.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.

faqs.answer: The BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus is not similar for all colleges and universities in India. Every institution has a certain set of curriculum guidelines that they follow and set the syllabus in that manner. But, the general topics covered in Agricultural Engineering classes are usually the same.Some important concepts include agricultural processes in industries, farm machinery, surveying methods, soil investigation, tools and control of machinery, horticulture and field crops. You will get a good hang of the field after you pursue a BTech degree course in this field that covers both theoretical as well technical aspects. Know more about -Agricultural Engineering
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus the same across all colleges?

faqs.answer: Shramshakti College of Agricultural Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.Sc.Candidates completed B.Sc.(Agri.)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Agriculture/ B.Sc.(Hort.)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Horticulture/ B.Sc.(Forestry)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Forestry/ B.Sc.(Agri. BioTech.)/ B.Tech.(Biotechnology)/B.B.M.(Agri.)/ B.Sc.(A.B.M.)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Agri. Business Management/ B.B.A.(Agri.)/ B.Tech.(Agril. Engg.)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) HomeScience/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Community Science**/ B.Sc.(Animal Husbandry)/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Sericulture or equivalent degree of 4 years duration from any recognized agriculture related University are eligible to apply. Candidates from B.Tech.(Agri. Engg.) are eligible for admission in "Agril. Meteorology" subject ; B.Sc.(Hons.) Home Science/ B.Sc.(Hons.) Community Science are eligible for admission in "Agricultural Extension and Communication" subject; and B.Sc.(Animal Husbandry) are eligible for admission in "Animal Husbandry" subject ; only with CET-Subject: Agriculture. Candidates graduated from Other State must have degree from ICAR accredited Agriculture University.B.E. / B.TechCandidate passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra State Board of Higher Secondary Education with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Biology as optional are eligible to apply. Candidate who have passed qualifying examination without Biology/Mathematics will have to complete deficiency courses. Candidate of physically handicapped category with minimum aggregate marks 40% are eligible to apply.

Candidates graduated from Other State must have degree from ICAR accredited Agriculture University.

Candidate passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra State Board of Higher Secondary Education with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Biology as optional are eligible to apply.
Candidate who have passed qualifying examination without Biology/Mathematics will have to complete deficiency courses.
Candidate of physically handicapped category with minimum aggregate marks 40% are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: Shramshakti College of Agricultural Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is best college.

content.Placements: In our college, 100% students are placed in best companies, for example, Cadbury, Coca-Cola, Katraj Dairy, Pravara Dairy, Prabhat Dairy, and Navale Dairy. Maximum package for all students is 2 LPA given by company. In our college, all students get an internship with the help of teachers.
content.Infrastructure: In college, it has best quality of library, fully equipped classrooms, and Wi-Fi coverage of entire campus. Library is of the very best quality, and all course-related books are available. College hostel is very clean and disciplined.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has decent placements and supportive faculty, but the curriculum needs industry updates.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students get placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ITC, Bayer, and Mahyco. 50-60% of students got internships at Syngenta, UPL and IFFCO. The top roles offered are agronomist, sales officer, and research associate. Students also get jobs in banks.
content.Infrastructure: It has labs for soil testing and horticulture crops. The hostel is really good and there is no ragging. Drinking water is available. There is a hot water for bathing. Toilets and bathrooms are clean. In one room, there are 6-8 fans in the hostel. Classrooms have smart boards.

paragraphs: Mind Power University admission for the season 2025 isongoingfor all UG, PG and diploma courses. Admission to the university ismerit-based.Mind Power Universityoffers various courses in the fields of Engineering, Science, Management, Commerce, and others. The university courses include BTech, BCom, MTech, MA, etc. Candidates interested in applying for any courses are required to apply online by visiting the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about the Mind Power University admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection and admission process:

Admission to all the courses offered by Mind Power University is subject to the merit of the last qualifying exam. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria set by the university for admission. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for Mind Power University course admission 2025:
Eligibility

Steps for Mind Power UniversityAdmission Process2025
Mind Power University admissionprocessstarts with filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Mind Power University2025:
STEP 1: Mind Power UniversityApplication Process 2025

Candidates looking for admission to any course are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for admission. After filling out the criteria candidates are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the university.
STEP 2: Mind Power University Selection Round
Mind Power Universityselects candidates for some UG, PG and diploma courses based on the last qualifying entrance exam score.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the requiredMind Power Universityfeewithin the given deadline to secure their seats.

college_info.college_name: Millia Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Millia Institute of Technology Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.answer: A:    Millia Institute of Technology provides programmes including After 10th Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Millia Institute of Technology offer?

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of the college was good.

review_content.Placements: The placement department of our college is good as it provides plenty of opportunities to get placed. Some placement drives were conducted recently in 2018, and many of the talented students got placed in those companies with decent packages in nearby cities. Some of them got placed in other states too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and everyone has access to it, though the social networks can't be accessed. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technologies for the students to learn and gain knowledge. Libraries have almost all the books that a student or professor needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good infrastructure and provides the facilities as well.

review_content.Placements: Millia Institute of Technology offers very good packages. Recently, our passed out seniors got a decent package of around Rs. 1 lakh per annum to Rs. 2 lakhs per annum. The companies like Desi Power plant have come for the electrical engineer's placement in our college. The minimum salary offered to the freshers was around Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: Millia Institute of Technology offers a decent infrastructure with all the amenities and is well-equipped. The Wi-Fi facility runs around the campus 24x7. The labs are equipped with all the equipment. All the books are available in our library. The canteen food is awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good to get a degree without having any knowledge.

review_content.Placements: The average salary package offered is 0.7 LPA to 1 LPA. Top recruiters are Dalmia, Microsoft, etc. Around 10% of students got internships. The top role offered in our course is civil engineer, which takes you to construction sites or companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is enabled at this college. The library is good for reading books. Classrooms are not that good. The hostel rooms are good, but the canteen food is not tasty. Every month, sports are held at our college.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are very knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. This course must be relevant. It does not make students industry-ready. Exams are very difficult in this college. Exams are not taken semesterly. Lab classes are also done weekly.
